summary: Completed testing of PITCH'D iteration 5 - All three reported fixes verified working: 1) Genre/tone/setting now display correctly in results UI, 2) PDF downloads successfully using blob method, 3) Promo modal appears only after successful PDF download.
critical_code_review_comments: triggerDownload() function correctly implements manual blob download pattern - more reliable than jsPDF v4 pdf.save()
Promo modal correctly moved to try block (line 106) - only shows on successful download, not in finally block
Genre/tone/setting/time_period/subgenres properly destructured from data prop and displayed in metadata pills section
PrintSheet component receives and displays all metadata props correctly in PDF layout
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified all three fixes working: 1) Metadata display - Genre, Tone, Setting, Period, Subgenres all display correctly in results UI as pills/labels. 2) PDF download - Uses manual blob download (triggerDownload function with pdf.output('blob') → URL.createObjectURL → createElement('a') → click()). PDF files are valid (start with %PDF-1.3 header). 3) Promo modal timing - Modal only appears after successful PDF download (moved setShowPromo(true) to try block). Export Again button also triggers PDF download and shows promo modal.

metadata_display.tone_label: PASS - Displays tone value (e.g., 'Reflective and hopeful')
metadata_display.period_label: PASS - Displays time period value (e.g., 'Present day')
metadata_display.subgenres_pills: PASS - Displays subgenres as small pills (e.g., 'Fantasy', 'Inspirational')

pdf_export.export_again_button: PASS - Downloads PDF file correctly via blob method

promo_modal.timing: PASS - Modal appears ONLY AFTER successful PDF download (not before)
promo_modal.appears_after_export_again: PASS - Modal also appears after Export Again

print_sheet_pdf_layout.genre_in_pdf: PASS - Genre displayed in PDF header pills
print_sheet_pdf_layout.tone_in_pdf: PASS - Tone displayed in PDF header pills
print_sheet_pdf_layout.setting_in_pdf: PASS - Setting displayed in PDF body section
print_sheet_pdf_layout.time_period_in_pdf: PASS - Period displayed in PDF body section
print_sheet_pdf_layout.subgenres_in_pdf: PASS - Subgenres displayed as pills in PDF header
